scripts.prod: npm run build:assets && npm run build-css && npm run site:serve
scripts.serve: npm run build:assets && npm run build-css && npm run site:serve
scripts.serve:test: npm run build:assets && npm run build-css && npm run site:serve
scripts.serve:test:static: npm run build:assets && npm run build-css && npm run site:build && node --import tsx test/static-server.ts
scripts.serve:test:static:nobuild: npm run site:build && node --import tsx test/static-server.ts
scripts.watch: bash -lc 'set -uo pipefail; npx tsc --project tsconfig.assets.json --watch & p1=$!; node --import tsx ./node_modules/webpack-cli/bin/cli.js --config webpack.config.ts --mode development --watch & p2=$!; wait "$p1"; wait "$p2"'
scripts.build:legacy: npx tsc --project tsconfig.assets.json && node --import tsx scripts/strip-cjs-prologue.ts
scripts.build:assets: npm run build:legacy && npm run build:compare
scripts.docs:jsdoc:autofix: node --import tsx scripts/add-missing-jsdoc.ts && npm run docs:jsdoc
scripts.lint: npm run lint:eslint && npm run lint:biome
scripts.test:i18n:smoke: node --import tsx ./node_modules/jest/bin/jest.js --config jest.config.ts --selectProjects unit --runTestsByPath js/compare/__tests__/i18n.test.ts js/compare/__tests__/siteI18n.test.ts --runInBand
scripts.test: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit && npm run test:a11y && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:e2e: npm run test:e2e:preflight && node --import tsx test/run-e2e.ts
scripts.test:e2e:nobuild: npm run test:e2e:preflight && node --import tsx test/run-e2e.ts --nobuild --in-band
scripts.test:e2e:parallel: npm run test:e2e:preflight && node --import tsx test/run-e2e.ts
scripts.test:docker: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test:unit:coverage -- --maxWorkers=50% && npm run test:a11y -- --maxWorkers=50% && npm run test:e2e:nobuild
scripts.probe:memory: node --import tsx test/memory-probe.ts --interval 1000 --duration 240000 --out test/memory-serve-report.json -- npm run serve
scripts.probe:memory:watch: node --import tsx test/memory-probe.ts --interval 1000 --duration 240000 --out test/memory-watch-report.json -- npm run watch
scripts.perf:report: npm run build && node --import tsx test/perf-report.ts
scripts.verify:all:parallel: bash -lc 'set -uo pipefail; fail=0; npm run lint & p1=$!; npm run typecheck & p2=$!; npm run test:unit & p3=$!; npm run test:a11y & p4=$!; npm run test:e2e:parallel & p5=$!; wait "$p1" || fail=1; wait "$p2" || fail=1; wait "$p3" || fail=1; wait "$p4" || fail=1; wait "$p5" || fail=1; exit "$fail"'
